tracks.suno_lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Dripping poison, sweet as candy
You call it love but I call it deadly
Neon signs flash your name in the dark
Another ghost with a beautiful spark

[Pre-Chorus]
I know better than to stay
But the venom pulls me in each way

[Chorus]
Neon venom in my veins
Dancing pretty with the pain
You're the drug I can't delete
Every dose tastes bittersweet
Neon venom, neon venom
Can't escape what I keep letting in

[Verse 2]
Mirror cracks beneath your smile
Toxic halo, so versatile
Love me, leave me, watch me bleed
Plant the thorns and call them seeds

[Pre-Chorus]
I know better than to stay
But the venom pulls me in each way

[Chorus]
Neon venom in my veins
Dancing pretty with the pain
You're the drug I can't delete
Every dose tastes bittersweet
Neon venom, neon venom
Can't escape what I keep letting in

[Bridge]
Cut the wires, burn the strings
Feel the sting of everything
I'm done bleeding neon blue
I'm the poison now, not you

[Outro]
Neon venom, fading slow
Letting go, letting go

tracks.suno_lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Windows down on a two-lane road
Dust and gold in the evening glow
Radio playing our favorite song
Sundown drive and the night is young

[Pre-Chorus]
Ain't nothing money could buy
Worth more than this open sky

[Chorus]
Sundown drive, take me where the stars begin
Feel the wind like freedom on my skin
Turn the music loud, leave the world behind
Every mile's a memory, every sunset mine
Sundown drive

[Verse 2]
Fireflies dancing by the creek
Wildflower fields as far as you can see
Your hand in mine, no rush at all
Summer nights that never seem to fall

[Pre-Chorus]
Ain't nothing money could buy
Worth more than this open sky

[Chorus]
Sundown drive, take me where the stars begin
Feel the wind like freedom on my skin
Turn the music loud, leave the world behind
Every mile's a memory, every sunset mine
Sundown drive

[Bridge]
Let the world keep spinning fast
Out here, time was made to last
Nothing matters but this road
And the story left untold

[Outro]
Sundown drive, sundown drive
Take me home, take me home

tracks.description:
Мөнхийн тал нутгийн дуу — The song of the eternal steppe.

Authentic Mongolian khöömii (throat singing) meets the haunting tones of the morin khuur (horsehead fiddle). A UNESCO-recognized art form that carries the voice of the Mongolian nomadic soul across endless grasslands.
